channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KRANTI] Promoters of Kranti Industries Acquire Shares Through Off-Market Inter Se Transfer
item.description:
Kranti Industries Ltd. has received a disclosure from promoters Smt. Indubala Subhash Vora, Mr. Sachin Subhash Vora, and Mr. Sumit Subhash Vora regarding the acquisition of 2,00,000 equity shares each by Mr. Sachin Subhash Vora and Mr. Sumit Subhash Vora from Smt. Indubala Subhash Vora. This transfer is through an off-market inter se transfer between the promoters of the company by way of gift.

  • Kranti Industries Ltd. promoters involved in share acquisition
  • 2,00,000 equity shares transferred from Smt. Indubala Subhash Vora to Mr. Sachin Subhash Vora and Mr. Sumit Subhash Vora each
  • Transfer through off-market inter se transfer between promoters by way of gift
  • Transaction valued at 2,00,000 equity shares of Kranti Industries Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kranti Industries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BLOOM] Bloom Dekor Ltd.: Appointments of Secretarial Auditor, Internal Auditor, and Change in Designation of CFO
item.description:
🔥 Trending

In a Board Meeting held on March 21, 2026, Bloom Dekor Ltd.'s Board of Directors approved several decisions. M/s. ALAP & Co. LLP, Company Secretaries were appointed as Secretarial Auditor for F.Y. 2025-26. M/s. B. T. Vora & Co., Chartered Accountant were appointed as Internal Auditor for the financial year 2025-26. Furthermore, the designation of Mrs. Falguni Rajanbhai Shah was changed from Chief Financial Officer to Chief Financial Officer and Additional (Executive Director).

  • Appointment of M/s. ALAP & Co. LLP, Company Secretaries as Secretarial Auditor for F.Y. 2025-26.
  • Appointment of M/s. B. T. Vora & Co., Chartered Accountant as Internal Auditor for the financial year 2025-26.
  • Change in designation of Mrs. Falguni Rajanbhai Shah from Chief Financial Officer to Chief Financial Officer and Additional (Executive Director).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLOOM DEKOR LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NAUKRI] Info Edge India Faces Rs. 3,64,63,140 Tax Demand for Assessment Year 2024-25
item.description:
Info Edge (India) Ltd. has disclosed a Notice of Demand dated March 20, 2026, w.r.t. Assessment Order received from the Assessment Unit, Income Tax Department for Assessment Year 2024-25. The demand is for Rs. 3,64,63,140 under Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961, primarily due to the disallowance of ESOP expenses claimed by the Company. The Company is currently reviewing the order and evaluating the next steps. There is no material impact on the financials or operations of the Company due to this order for the current financial year.

  • Info Edge India received a Notice of Demand dated March 20, 2026, from the Income Tax Department
  • The demand is for Rs. 3,64,63,140 under Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961
  • The demand is primarily due to the disallowance of ESOP expenses claimed by the Company
  • The Company is currently reviewing the order and evaluating the next steps
  • No material impact on the financials or operations of the Company due to this order for the current financial year

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INFO EDGE (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [VOITHPAPR] Voith Paper Fabrics India Ltd. Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Voith Paper Fabrics India Ltd. has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct. The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter/year ended on 31st March, 2026. This information is intended for record and dissemination.

  • Voith Paper Fabrics India Ltd. announces closure of trading window
  • Trading window to remain closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure to last until 48 hours after the declaration of Q4/FY26 results
  • Announcement made in accordance with SEBI regulations and company's Code of Conduct

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VOITH PAPER FABRICS INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DOMS] DOMS Industries' Subsidiary Receives Order from Office of Superintendent of Central Taxes (CGST), Thane
item.description:
DOMS Industries Ltd. has disclosed an order received by its subsidiary, Uniclan Healthcare Private Limited, from the Office of Superintendent of Central Taxes (CGST), Thane. The order, received on March 20, 2026, is in relation to a Show Cause cum Demand Notice issued under the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017. The notice alleges wrongful availment of Input Tax Credit and utilisation of such ITC without actual receipt of the underlying goods/services. The alleged inadmissible ITC amount is ₹ 5,22,692 with a penalty of ₹ 10,45,384 and interest as calculated under Section 50 of CGST Act, 2017. Uniclan is evaluating appropriate legal remedy and proposes to file a response within the prescribed time limit. The Company assures no material impact on its financial, operational, or other activities due to this order.

  • DOMS Industries' subsidiary, Uniclan Healthcare Private Limited, received an order from the Office of Superintendent of Central Taxes (CGST), Thane.
  • The order is in relation to a Show Cause cum Demand Notice issued under the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017.
  • The notice alleges wrongful availment of Input Tax Credit and utilisation of such ITC without actual receipt of the underlying goods/services.
  • Uniclan is evaluating appropriate legal remedy and proposes to file a response within the prescribed time limit.
  • The Company assures no material impact on its financial, operational, or other activities due to this order.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DOMS Industries Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [BLOOM] Bloom Dekor Ltd.: Board Meeting Updates for FY 2025-26
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Bloom Dekor Ltd., in their meeting held on March 21, 2026, appointed M/s. ALAP & Co. LLP, Company Secretaries as Secretarial Auditor and M/s. B. T. Vora & Co., Chartered Accountant as Internal Auditor for the financial year 2025-26. The Board also approved the change of designation of Mrs. Falguni Rajanbhai Shah from Chief Financial Officer to Chief Financial Officer and Additional (Executive Director).

  • Appointment of M/s. ALAP & Co. LLP, Company Secretaries as Secretarial Auditor for F.Y. 2025-26.
  • Appointment of M/s. B. T. Vora & Co., Chartered Accountant as Internal Auditor for the financial year 2025-26.
  • Change of designation of Mrs. Falguni Rajanbhai Shah from Chief Financial Officer to Chief Financial Officer and Additional (Executive Director).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLOOM DEKOR LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BLOOM] Bloom Dekor Ltd. Appoints New Secretarial Auditor, Internal Auditor, and Changes CFO Designation
item.description:
Bloom Dekor Ltd. announced the appointment of M/s. ALAP & Co. LLP, Company Secretaries as the Secretarial Auditor for F.Y. 2025-26, M/s. B. T. Vora & Co., Chartered Accountant as the Internal Auditor for the financial year 2025-26, and changed the designation of Mrs. Falguni Rajanbhai Shah from Chief Financial Officer to Chief Financial Officer and Additional (Executive Director).

  • Appointment of M/s. ALAP & Co. LLP, Company Secretaries as Secretarial Auditor for F.Y. 2025-26.
  • Appointment of M/s. B. T. Vora & Co., Chartered Accountant as Internal Auditor for the financial year 2025-26.
  • Change of designation of Mrs. Falguni Rajanbhai Shah from Chief Financial Officer to Chief Financial Officer and Additional (Executive Director).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLOOM DEKOR LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BIRLAMONEY] Aditya Birla Money Ltd. Settles SEBI Investigation for Rs. 1,00,000
item.description:
Aditya Birla Money Ltd. has paid a settlement amount of Rs. 1,00,000 to the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) as part of a Settlement Order. The investigation was carried out to ascertain the company's association with certain algo platforms offering assured returns. No material impact is expected on the company's financial, operational, or other activities. The company is no longer associated with the mentioned Algo vendors.

  • Aditya Birla Money Ltd. pays settlement amount to SEBI
  • Investigation carried out for association with certain algo platforms offering assured returns
  • No material impact expected on the company's financial, operational, or other activities
  • Company is no longer associated with the mentioned Algo vendors

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADITYA BIRLA MONEY LTD.-$ | Category: Legal

item.title: [MPFSL] Mather And Platt Fire Systems Ltd Schedules Board Meeting to Discuss Alteration of MoA, EGM, and Business Acquisition
item.description:
Mather And Platt Fire Systems Ltd has announced a board meeting scheduled on 25th March 2026. The agenda includes considering and approving alteration of the Main Object Clause of Memorandum of Association, approving the draft notice and deciding the day, date, and place for the Extra-Ordinary General Meeting, appointing a Non-Executive Independent Director, and considering the proposal for acquisition of the business of E-trav Tech Limited by way of a slump sale. A Reconstruction Committee will be constituted to oversee and facilitate this transaction.

  • Alteration of the Main Object Clause of Memorandum of Association (MoA) of the Company
  • Approval of the draft notice and decision on Day, Date, and Place for Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM)
  • Appointment of a Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Consideration of the proposal for acquisition of the business of E-trav Tech Limited
  • Constitution of a Reconstruction Committee for the transaction

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MATHER & PLATT FIRE SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HARAFIN] Haryana Financial Corporation Appoints New Managing Director, Shri Sushil Sarwan
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Pursuant to regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR), Regulation, 2015, it is hereby informed that the State Government vide Orders no. 1/37/2026-1SII dated 19.03.2026 has appointed Shri Sushil Sarwan, IAS, as Managing Director of Haryana Financial Corporation (HFC). Shri Sarwan takes over from Dr. Aditya Dahiya, IAS, who has joined as Managing Director of Haryana Financial Corporation on 20.03.2076.

  • Shri Sushil Sarwan, IAS, appointed as Managing Director of Haryana Financial Corporation
  • Shri Sarwan replaces Dr. Aditya Dahiya, IAS, who joined HFC on 20.03.2076
  • Appointment made by the State Government vide Orders no. 1/37/2026-1SII dated 19.03.2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HARYANA FINANCIAL CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Management Change
